name: Modal
goal: Render a themed, accessible modal dialog wrapping the native <dialog> element with slots for body and footer actions.
description: A modal dialog built on the native <dialog> element with showModal(). Provides header with title and optional dismiss button, default body slot, and right-aligned footer slot. Supports ESC and backdrop-click dismissal (guarded by dismissible attribute). Emits ce-modal-open and ce-modal-close events. Returns focus to the invoking element on close.

props.name: open
props.description: When true the modal is visible; setting to false closes it.

props.name: title
props.description: Text rendered as the modal header title.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: When true (default), ESC and backdrop-click close the modal. When false, only programmatic .close() works.

events.name: ce-modal-open
events.description: Fires after the modal becomes visible.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Opens the modal (equivalent to setting open=true).

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the modal (equivalent to removing the open attribute).

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Action buttons, right-aligned. Footer bar is hidden when this slot is empty.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Transition timing for close button hover.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-5
cssVariables.description: Header, body, and footer horizontal padding.

globalDependencies.purpose: Opens the dialog in the top-layer with a focus trap.
Caches the previously-focused element so focus can be restored on close.

sideEffects.description: Calls dialog.showModal() and dialog.close() to manage the native top-layer.
sideEffects.reason: Required to leverage the browser's built-in top-layer, focus-trap, and backdrop rendering.

sideEffects.description: Returns focus to document.activeElement captured at open time.
sideEffects.reason: WCAG 2.1 SC 2.4.3 focus management: focus must return to the trigger element after a dialog closes.

a11y.notes: The native <dialog> element supplies role=dialog and focus-trap automatically when opened with showModal(). aria-modal=true and aria-label are added to the dialog element. The close button has aria-label='Close'. ESC dismissal is handled via the native cancel event (when dismissible).
